# ctyun_rabbitmq_exchange (Resource)
**详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10000118/10001967**



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

resource "ctyun_rabbitmq_exchange" "test" {
  instance_id = "8ccc8af2e6704080a72548735a081660"
  vhost = "/"
  name = "edxca"
  type = "direct"
  # x_delayed_type = "fanout"
  # durable = true
  # auto_delete = true
  # internal = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) rabbitMq实例ID
- `name` (String) 交换器名称，只能包含字母，数字，短横线-和下划线_
- `type` (String) 交换器类型，支持direct、topic、headers、fanout、x-delayed-message
- `vhost` (String) vhost名称

### Optional

- `alternate_exchange` (String) 备用交换机名称
- `auto_delete` (Boolean) 是否自动删除，默认false
- `durable` (Boolean) 是否持久化，默认false
- `internal` (Boolean) 是否内置，默认false
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID
- `x_delayed_type` (String) 当type为x-delayed-message时必填

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID
